summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a famously fun and highly praised Dead show
review: The reviewer calls this recording great, highlighting it as one of the most enjoyable and best performances the Grateful Dead ever delivered. The soundboard source delivers clear, high‑quality audio, making the already stellar concert even more listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises both the performance and the recording, indicating an exceptional show with a high‑quality capture; confidence is medium due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as great with no noted issues; implies clear, balanced sound typical of a good soundboard source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as one of the funnest and best shows, suggesting strong overall pacing and energy throughout.
